title: Underwear
wikitext:
[]: Underwear             Quote Post by dylanjacobs1991 » Sun Jul 16, 2006 1:31 am Half the people who come to read this are just here cuz there thinking it has something to do with the eva girls in underwear, and the other half are here to flame the living bejeezuz out of me, but i welcome it cuz i got nothing better to do so.........What kinda underwear do you think the cast of eva wears, boys and girls....... Shinji: Tightie Whities (Briefs) Asuka: pink bra and panties Rei: Granny Panties (He He) Misato: Sexy red lace panties and bra Kaji: Commando (lol) Ritsuko: Black thong and Bra Hikari: Hello Kitty Underwear Touji: Blue boxers Kensuke: Striped boxers Kaworu: Tightie Whities (Briefs) Gendou: Boxer-Briefs Yui: No underwear wear she is Fuyutski: Eww, plain white boxers Hyuuga: boxers Aoba: Thong Maya: white panties and bra Don't mind me, im fucked up............ :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sun Jul 16, 2006 2:18 am .... I don't want to THINK about what underwear some of these characters wear. Really, this is a rather pointless topic. WHY should we think about this? Aren't there more normal topics to discuss about here?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sun Jul 16, 2006 2:46 am Hey you forgot Keel! But he's a cyborg....he doesn't need them anyways....

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jul 16, 2006 2:53 am This should really be in chit-chat... We see Rei dressing in ep#5, and the entire contents of her lingerie draw spilled out on the floor - just plain white cotton, not even a NERV-issue logo. We see Misato dressing in ep#12, and it's just a slightly grubby pink. And episode 8 shows us Asuka's taste in undies matches Rei's - and Touji's striped boxers.

[]:             Quote Post by Light of the Dawn » Sun Jul 16, 2006 2:53 am Ah... ~No responding~

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Sun Jul 16, 2006 4:15 am I was under the impression I'll get to see some pics of all our ladies here on the forums in lingerie..... 8) And thought to myself, yeah, about time. Somebody took initiative....Go you! I'm sad now. :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jul 16, 2006 11:41 am This topic makes me sad. :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Jul 16, 2006 11:45 am They all wear chastity belts. Now forget about it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryousanki King » Sun Jul 16, 2006 4:21 pm The most important character was omitted! How could you forget Jesus? Everyone knows Evangelion is an extension of one of his many parables.

[]:             Quote Post by PilotIkari » Mon Jul 17, 2006 2:16 am Ryousanki King wrote: The most important character was omitted! How could you forget Jesus? Everyone knows Evangelion is an extension of one of his many parables.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Jul 19, 2006 8:57 am Yeah, and what kind of panties does Ramiel have?! Heh?! Perhaps blue, to match her pretty skin... :cry: ... :cry: ... Kinda ignorant topic, bro... :S :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Wed Jul 19, 2006 9:13 am "underwear? they wouldn't even give me a fucking tampon!" - Lilith

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Wed Jul 19, 2006 9:32 am darth_mark wrote: "underwear? they wouldn't even give me a fucking tampon!" - Lilith

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Wed Jul 19, 2006 9:35 am This is the first time I've wanted to blow my brains out in a very long time. Though imagining some of the chicks in their undergarments is hawt.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Wed Jul 19, 2006 9:35 am Well then if she's always having menstruation sooner or later she'll have anaemia. Gendo you should give her some more iron. Look her skin is turning whiter and whiter.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Jul 19, 2006 10:00 am There are the nails... :P

[]:             Quote Post by defiate » Wed Jul 19, 2006 1:25 pm Featured in "Evangelion Anthologies" comedy/parody manga- Gendo wearing a man-thong and a police cap. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . and nothing else.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sun Jul 23, 2006 10:44 pm I was hoping to see apic of Kaworu in his underwear, or better yet without his underwear *nosebleed*

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Jul 23, 2006 11:04 pm No.. You want to see Kaworu wearing Asuka's underwear. :roll: If a thread this lame can exist, why not figure out which fetish Shinji associates with each of his leading ladies? There's Asuka as a dominatrix (self-loathing issues), Rei as a doll (submission issues), and Misato dressing him like a baby, followed with spankings and 'nursing' (mommy complex). Yeah, that was all increadibly wrong. I feel ashamed for writing it (not that it's much less dignified than speculating on characters' underwear though). :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sun Jul 23, 2006 11:07 pm [quote="Timstuff"]No.. You want to see Kaworu wearing [/i]Asuka's[i] underwear. :roll:quote] no i want to see him wearing my underwear
